scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,SERVER -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @fluxcy/web" "npm run dev -w @fluxcy/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @fluxcy/server && npm run build -w @fluxcy/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n WEB,SERVER -c cyan,green "npm run start -w @fluxcy/web" "npm run start -w @fluxcy/server"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @fluxcy/server && npm run lint -w @fluxcy/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @fluxcy/server && npm run test -w @fluxcy/web
